sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56761" key="kera/tisis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κερᾱ´τ-ισις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n56761.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">butting with horns</tr_>: metaph., of battering-rams, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">impact</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1165.tlg001:224:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Poliorc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">224.13</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
